scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace backend" "npm run dev --workspace frontend"
scripts.vercel-build: npm install --workspace backend && npm install --workspace frontend && npm run build --workspace backend && npm run build --workspace frontend
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace backend && npm run build --workspace frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace backend && npm run lint --workspace frontend
